workspace.reviewNoEducational: This video did not meet requirements for secondary creation. Please upload another.
workspace.outputLangHint: Output language is locked after analysis; switching only changes UI text.

education_expert.name: Education expert
education_expert.description: Extracts synopsis, highlights, and educational themes from the source video for later steps

reviewer.name: Reviewer
reviewer.description: Scores content, look, narrative, and recreation potential using your notes and the analysis

story_writer.name: Story writer
story_writer.description: Secondary creation: keeps the educational core but may fully reshape characters and plot

storyboard.name: Storyboard director
storyboard.description: Plans shot count; ~5s per shot; generates boards and image-to-video prompts

video_generator.name: Video generator
video_generator.description: Generates each scene from boards and prompts

video_composer.name: Video composer
video_composer.description: Concatenates scenes and exports the final video

promptDebug.hint: After analyze, review, story, storyboard, or video steps, model prompts used by each agent appear here (debug).
promptDebug.title: Prompt debug

login.title: Log in to Yingfang
login.subtitleSupabase: Sign in with Supabase (email) to use the workspace
login.subtitleLocal: Sign in to use the workspace and history

history.title: History
history.body: Project history will appear here. Continue by project ID from the workspace in this version.

landing.tagline: Multi-agent video storytelling · Log in to start a project
landing.flowIntro: Upload a video, then run analysis & review, new story, storyboard, per-scene render, and export. Track progress and prompts in the workspace sidebar.
landing.flow1p: Upload media and get structured understanding for narrative and boards.
landing.flow2p: Generate adapted copy and shots, then scene-level video.
landing.flow3p: Combine segments and export the finished file or link.
landing.agentsIntro: Each stage maps to an agent (analysis, story, boards, video, consistency). Status appears in the workspace sidebar.
landing.agent1p: Semantic understanding of video and clips for coherent narrative and visual constraints.
landing.agent2p: Adapted story and beats for boards and captions while respecting constraints.
landing.agent3p: Continuity and quality checks to reduce jumps in character, style, and shots.
landing.tipsIntro: Use a stable network for long jobs; do not close the tab during upload or generation. Resume via project ID in workspace or history.
landing.tips1p: Only upload video you have rights to use. Demo assets should be public domain or yours; stop and contact an admin if unsure.
landing.noteBody: Layout is inspired by academic project sites. Behavior follows the live backend. The dev proxy forwards to

page1.title: Upload video
page1.subtitle: Drag and drop or click to add your file
page1.notesHelp: Briefly describe the clip, style, and what kind of secondary creation you want. The reviewer scores using this plus the analysis.
page1.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Explainer short — want a mystery retelling; or documentary look — unify to one visual style…

page2.title: Source analysis
page2.reviewSubtitle: Admission review (must meet threshold to continue)

page3.title: New story
page3.subtitleReady: AI retelling — see if it fits
page3.footer: Next we plan shots from this script (~5s each), boards and image-to-video prompts, then scene videos and final assembly.

page5.title: Scene videos
page5.subtitleReady: Each shot renders here; combine when ready
